since_last: 38% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.18% · BTC -2.12% · Gold -2.79% · Nasdaq100 -0.07%. 38% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.52%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.52%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.74%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: RXRX is the standout at +4.34%
cards.body: Leaders: RXRX +4.34%, WDAY +2.63%, SYM +2.33%, UPST +2.32%, INTU +2.26%. Laggards: OKLO -4.16%, OKLO -4.16%, SMR -4.10%, INOD -4.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.63% at $152.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
